Lecture schedule

Colby College is supportive of the religious practices of its students, faculty, and staff and is committed to ensuring that all students are able to observe their religious beliefs without academic penalty. If you observe a religious holiday that will impact your work in this course, please see me at the beginning of the term. We will then work to find a reasonable accommodation that will allow you to complete the academic work.

1(1) Unless otherwise noted, readings will be from Levins and (2) “Reading” should be read before the Monday where it’s listed. I will have the readings posted one week before we begin covering the material, at the latest.
2(1) Quizzes will be given on Fridays, (2) Problem sets will be assigned on the Friday they are listed below, and (3) Problem sets are due one week (Fridays) from when they are assigned.
3Exams will be given in the evenings between 7 and 9 PM on either of the two offered days (your choice).

Week Date Topics Readings1 Assignments2 Lecture material
1 9/3 Introduction to class and ecology in general   Quiz 1 (Q1) on Fri., Problem set 1 (PS1, PS1 Key, globalHumanPop.csv) IntroLec (IntroLec pdf), EcoPinciplesLec html, EcoPinciplesLec pdf
2 9/10 Introduction to population ecology Part II Introduction, II.3.1–2 Q2, PS2, PS2 Key, Drosophila.csv IsleRoyaleData, ObsPopPatternsLec, RCheatSheet, R help for PS1, RIntroLec
3 9/17 How are populations regulated? II.2.1–2, II.1.1 Q3, PS3, PS3 Key DenIndLec, DensDepLec
4 9/24   I.6, II.4, 11.2.3–4, 1.10 Q4, PS4, PS4 Key StructuredPopsLec, Space&StochasLec LifeHistLec
5 10/1   I.1, I.12 Q5, PS5, PS5 Key NichesLec, GeoDistLec, Neutralism&PhasePlanesLec
6 10/8   II.11, II.6, II.7.1–3 Q6, PS6 MutualismLec, CompetitionLec
7 10/15   Review for exam Q7, PS7, PS7 Key EnemyVictimLec
8 10/22 Ecosystems and community ecology III.1 Q8, PS8, PS8 Key IntroEcosys&CommsLec, Bio&CommDivLec
  10/22/233 Exam I      
9 10/29   III.7, III.6 Q9, PS9, PS9 data, PS9 Key, PS13 StrucDiv&WebsLec, TrophicEcoLec
10 11/5   III.9, III.11, III.12 Q10, PS10, PS10 Key ProductivityLec
11 11/12   III.10 Q11, PS11 NitrogenLec, PhosphorusLec
12 11/19   V.5   DisturbanceLec
13 11/26   III.4, III.17 Q12, PS11&12 SuccessionLec
  11/28/293 Exam II      
14 12/3   III.16   MacroEcoLec
  12/13 @ 9 AM Exam III
